name: Elite Commercial REIT
summary: Elite Commercial REIT operates as a real estate investment trust. The company primarily invests in commercial assets and real estate-related assets in the United Kingdom. Its investment properties comprise 96 freehold and 1 leasehold offices situated in England, Scotland, and Wales, which are primarily let to the UK Government. The company qualifies as a real estate investment trust for federal income tax purposes. Elite Commercial REIT Management Pte. Ltd. operates as the manager of Elite Commercial REIT. Elite Commercial REIT was founded in 2018 and is based in Singapore.
